description: Flat is an online music notation and collaboration platform for creating, editing, importing, and sharing sheet music. It also includes Flat for Education features for managing classes, assignments, and related educational resources.
summary: Flat exposes a REST API at https://api.flat.io/v2 with an OpenAPI spec and Bearer-token auth (personal access tokens or OAuth2), plus a public no-auth Import API link endpoint at https://flat.io/score/import-url.
